result: PASS — game runs 10 turns without crash

anyFactionHarvested.note: No faction gained resources beyond starting values (15 player, 35 AI). Harvesting system exists but units don't auto-harvest.

anyBuildingBuilt.note: Still 6 starter buildings. AI doesn't build structures yet — GOAP goals may need build actions.

combatOccurred.note: No combat kills, no HP loss. Factions are far apart on 44x44 map and move slowly.

cultUnitsSpawned.note: static_remnants grew from 0 to 6 cult_infantry units over 10 turns. Breach zones active.

factionsInDifferentTerritories.note: Territory % non-zero for all factions: player 1.5%, volt 3.7%, signal 3.6%, iron 3.8%, cult 1.7%

balanceObservations: Player starts with 6 units but 0 buildings — AI factions start with 4 units + 2 buildings each. This gives AI resource advantage (35 vs 15 starting resources).
AI units move each turn but don't harvest, build, or attack proactively. GOAP goals focus on movement toward player.
Cult spawning works correctly — breach zones spawn cult_infantry on ~3-turn cadence.
Territory slowly expands as units move — no tile claiming mechanic beyond proximity.
No faction engaged in combat in 10 turns. Small map but labyrinth walls create long pathfinding routes.
Resources are static — no income or production. Economy loop needs harvesting + building activation.
